commit.author: FlexNetOS <flexnetos@de-flex.net>

lines.content: ## Current Focus
Verifying the source build and architecture of the Meta platform before adoption by FlexNetOS Org.
Org-audit mission verified and closed (2026-06-12): POLICY v2 + fleet audit + protection rollout +
autonomous-loop e2e proof all adversarially re-verified against live state. Parent meta main CI is
green for the first time since 2026-06-04 (PR #11 merged b12f3c7ab; docs PR #12 carries the audit
docs + VERIFICATION-REPORT.md).
## Recent Activities
- Initialized FlexNetOS Knowledge Base with core architectural and design patterns.
Verifying the source build and architecture of the Meta platform before adoption by FlexNetOS Org.
## Recent Activities
- Initialized FlexNetOS Knowledge Base with core architectural and design patterns.

- Verification session: all claim clusters PASS; full evidence in VERIFICATION-REPORT.md (meta root).

([[incidents/shimmy-invariant-ppt-test-race]], resolved) — FlexNetOS/shimmy#4, reproduced 198/600 → 0/600.
- Honest deltas recorded: personal weave remote mutated post-session (archive holds all 6 SHAs);
parent main had unpushed 39423c3; NEEDS-HUMAN 0/7 actioned by human.

## Immediate Next Steps
1. Verify the build from source using `make build-all`.

2. Run workspace tests and integration tests.
3. Conduct deep planning session for integrations and automations.
1. HFTASK-0007 (P0): `hf session start|end` + kasetto preflight + session-ledger location.

4. Human queue: NEEDS-HUMAN.md (7 items, all still pending as of 2026-06-12 evening).

commit.message: Refresh active context: org-audit verified, main CI green, HFTASK queue next
